name: Special Screening
overview: Five young people try to enter the world of entertainment as they share the same dream, despite having different reasons and despite their different physical and psychological characteristics and social levels. An educated artist, Dr. Ezzat Abu Ouf, leads them along the way.

trailers.title: Yasmin Raeis - اعلان فيلم عرض خاص بطولة عزت ابو عوف وياسمين رئيس ودينا الشربيني وكريم فهمي
